llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Regional Compliance/Legal Intern
job.description: Objectives : We are looking for a legal and compliance intern who will provide a wide range of paralegal support as well as compliance / legal support in order to effectively facilitate daily operations of Regional / China Compliance team. The candidate should be proactive and diligent and understand business and operation needs of the organization. S/he should be detail oriented and excited to work collaboratively in an excellent compliance and legal team. Main Tasks: - Support regional compliance daily operation in Asia Pacific, including various compliance program / initiatives on compliance trainings, compliance campaign, data protection, etc. coordinate on feedback collection, consolidation, maintain paper filing and e-filing from various countries in Asia Pacific and manage the data up to date. - Conduct legal research, case analysis and summary, draft and / or review contracts, translate and / or proof-read le compliance documents, etc. - Support the preparation of high-profile compliance case investigation upon assignment. - Schedule appointments, make arrangement for meetings, workshops, event, etc. - Support other administrative tasks assigned. Requirements: - Education: major in Law, second year of Master or gap year is preferred - Working Experience: not required, law firm or inhouse internship experience is preferred - Technical Professional Knowledge: preferred to be fluent in both oral and written English; good at using MS office tools. - Others: team player and highly responsible work attitude, good communication and interpersonal skills 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用
